gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; within an area where dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students who clutch resumes inside branded folders line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, all set within an area where dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens and clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, an area where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; moreover, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and they clutch resumes inside branded folders; these activities are set within an area where dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; furthermore, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; moreover, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.
